original_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM("t1"."EXPR0" * "t2"."EXPR0"), 0) FROM (SELECT "JOB", COUNT(*) AS "EXPR0" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t1" INNER JOIN (SELECT "NAME", COUNT(*) AS "EXPR0" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t2" ON "t1"."JOB" = "t2"."NAME"
rewritten_query: SELECT COALESCE(SUM("t1"."EXPR0" * "t2"."EXPR0"), 0) FROM (SELECT "JOB", COUNT(*) AS "EXPR0" FROM "EMP" GROUP BY "JOB") AS "t1" INNER JOIN (SELECT "NAME", COUNT(*) AS "EXPR0" FROM "DEPT" GROUP BY "NAME") AS "t2" ON "t1"."JOB" = "t2"."NAME"
